metadata.note: Vignettes converted to online format with inferred categories

vignettes.scenario_text: Consider these two job opportunities with different work environments:

options.title: Option A: Job with KES 15,000/month
options.description: Monthly Earnings: KES 15,000 | Physical Demand & Risk: Light physical work and generally safe | Social Interaction: Work with coworkers (peers) | Career Growth: Few chances to learn new skills or move ahead

options.title: Option B: Job with KES 15,000/month
options.description: Monthly Earnings: KES 15,000 | Physical Demand & Risk: Light physical work and generally safe | Social Interaction: Work closely with customers/clients | Career Growth: Few chances to learn new skills or move ahead
